{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory Officer",
  "description": "LEAM Consulting&nbsp;Limited is the foremost consulting firm that stands out in areas of professional certification training, HR advisory services, Business Development/Startup, and IT consulting services in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Gbagi, Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate stock records and perform regular inventory reconciliations.
	Monitor inventory levels, initiate re-orders, and prevent stockouts.
	Ensure proper storage, labeling, and handling of products
	Prepare and update inventory reports, cost records, and usage summaries for management review.


Requirements


	Minimum OND
	Minimum of 1 year of experience
	Excellent organizational, analytical, and record-keeping skills.
	Must reside in Gbagi or its environments.


Salary
N65,000 - N70,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested &amp; qualified candidate should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@leamconsulting.com&nbsp;using Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For enquiries, send a WhatsApp message to: 0904710414.",

Inventory Officer Job at LEAM Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        LEAM Consulting Limited is the foremost consulting firm that stands out in areas of professional certification training, HR advisory services, Business Development/Startup, and IT consulting services in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer

Job Location: Gbagi, Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Maintain accurate stock records and perform regular inventory reconciliations.
	Monitor inventory levels, initiate re-orders, and prevent stockouts.
	Ensure proper storage, labeling, and handling of products
	Prepare and update inventory reports, cost records, and usage summaries for management review.


Requirements


	Minimum OND
	Minimum of 1 year of experience
	Excellent organizational, analytical, and record-keeping skills.
	Must reside in Gbagi or its environments.


Salary
N65,000 - N70,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested & qualified candidate should send their CV to: [email protected] using Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For enquiries, send a WhatsApp message to: 0904710414.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Graphic Designer",
  "description": "Mason Atlantic Limited is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphic Designer
Job Location:&nbsp;Oshodi / Isolo - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Graphic Designer with strong hands-on experience using modern design tools.
	This role is critical in shaping our visual identity and creating compelling content that drives brand awareness, engagement, and product adoption.


Key Responsibilities


	Create engaging visual content for social media, ads, email campaigns, and web platforms
	Design marketing materials including flyers, banners, pitch decks, and product visuals
	Produce short-form video content using CapCut (or similar tools)
	Maintain and evolve brand identity across all channels
	Collaborate with marketing, product, and sales teams
	Translate product features into clear, visually appealing designs
	Stay updated with SaaS design trends and best practices


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in a relevant field
	Minimum of 1 year experience as a Graphic Designer
	Strong proficiency in Canva, CapCut, and similar tools
	Working knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator is a plus)
	Strong portfolio (mandatory)
	Good understanding of branding, typography, layout, and color theory
	Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines
	Strong attention to detail and creativity


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience in a SaaS or tech environment
	Basic knowledge of UI/UX design
	Experience with motion graphics or animation.


What We Offer


	Salary: N150,000 monthly
	Growth opportunities
	Collaborative and innovative work environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV and portfolio to:&nbsp;atlmasonhr@gmail.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Graphic Designer&rdquo;&nbsp;as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Only candidates with a portfolio will be considered.",

Graphic Designer Job at Mason Atlantic Limited




        
    

        
        Mason Atlantic Limited is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphic Designer
Job Location: Oshodi / Isolo - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Graphic Designer with strong hands-on experience using modern design tools.
	This role is critical in shaping our visual identity and creating compelling content that drives brand awareness, engagement, and product adoption.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Create engaging visual content for social media, ads, email campaigns, and web platforms
	Design marketing materials including flyers, banners, pitch decks, and product visuals
	Produce short-form video content using CapCut (or similar tools)
	Maintain and evolve brand identity across all channels
	Collaborate with marketing, product, and sales teams
	Translate product features into clear, visually appealing designs
	Stay updated with SaaS design trends and best practices


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field
	Minimum of 1 year experience as a Graphic Designer
	Strong proficiency in Canva, CapCut, and similar tools
	Working knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator is a plus)
	Strong portfolio (mandatory)
	Good understanding of branding, typography, layout, and color theory
	Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines
	Strong attention to detail and creativity


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience in a SaaS or tech environment
	Basic knowledge of UI/UX design
	Experience with motion graphics or animation.


What We Offer


	Salary: N150,000 monthly
	Growth opportunities
	Collaborative and innovative work environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] using “Graphic Designer” as the subject of the email.

Note: Only candidates with a portfolio will be considered.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Chief Executive Officer (CEO) – Renewable Energy Infrastructure",
  "description": "Borderlesshr -&nbsp;Our model is predicated on empowering businesses like yours to build their engineering team without the risk, hassle or cost. You let us know what you want and we build your team from our diverse global pool of thoroughly pre-vetted software engineers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Executive Officer (CEO) &ndash; Renewable Energy Infrastructure

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To:&nbsp;Board of Directors / Portfolio Manager

Description
Our client business model is driven by three integrated revenue streams:


	High-margin C&amp;I solar EPC and service contracts
	Government PPP solar projects under long-term Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs)
	Developer fees at Financial Close on DFI-financed anchor projects


Year 1 targets include:


	20MW contracted capacity
	Anchor PPA secured
	$10&ndash;15M DFI project financing
	?1.2&ndash;2 billion in revenue
	The long-term vision is to build a continental infrastructure platform across 17+ African markets.


The Role


	This is a&nbsp;foundational leadership role. The CEO will build the company from the ground up&mdash;there is no existing structure or client base.


You will:


	Define and execute the commercial strategy
	Lead all major deals and negotiations
	Manage investor and DFI relationships
	Build and lead the executive team
	Deliver a 12-month performance mandate
	This is a&nbsp;high-accountability, high-reward rolewith clear quarterly milestones and direct Board oversight.


Performance Expectations
Q1 (April &ndash; June 2026):


	Operational Board established
	3 signed commercial deals; 15MW+ pipeline validated
	CFO hired within 60 days
	NERC captive generation license application submitted
	?250M revenue delivered


Q2 (July &ndash; September 2026):


	Series A funding ($1&ndash;2M) closed
	Anchor PPA (10&ndash;20MW) signed
	Land secured; feasibility study completed
	?450M cumulative revenue
	At least 3 DFI engagements initiated


Q3 (October &ndash; December 2026):


	SPV incorporated; project structured for DFI bankability
	DFI term sheet secured ($5&ndash;10M)
	EPC contract signed
	12MW contracted capacity
	?600M cumulative revenue


Q4 (January &ndash; March 2027):


	Financial Close achieved ($10&ndash;15M disbursed)
	Construction commenced
	20MW+ contracted
	?2 billion Year 1 revenue
	Positive Board Year 1 verdict


Core Responsibilities
Commercial Leadership:


	Build and close a &ge;40MW pipeline within Year 1
	Lead all major negotiations (C&amp;I, DISCOs, government)
	Secure and execute anchor PPA
	Maintain minimum 25% gross margin


Investor &amp; DFI Engagement:


	Develop relationships with DFIs (IFC, AfDB, FMO, Proparco)
	Lead Series A fundraising ($1&ndash;2M)
	Execute project finance strategy for anchor project
	Submit at least 2 international grant applications


Team Building &amp; Governance:


	Recruit key leadership roles within 60 days (CFO, CCO, Technical Lead)
	Set KPIs and manage performance
	Drive &ge;80% team retention
	Ensure governance, reporting, and compliance


Project Development:


	Oversee NERC licensing process
	Secure land and complete feasibility studies
	Structure SPVs and manage project execution
	Ensure project construction begins within Year 1


Financial Management:


	Maintain budget discipline and financial reporting
	Ensure minimum 25% margin across projects
	Oversee financial controls (including interim CFO duties if needed)


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with a minimum of 10 years&rsquo; leadership experience, with at least 5 years at Director/CEO/MD level.
	Proven track record of&nbsp;closing commercial deals in energy/infrastructure
	Direct experience working with or securing funding fromDevelopment Finance Institutions (DFIs)
	Strong knowledge of the&nbsp;Nigerian power sector(NERC, C&amp;I solar, DISCOs)
	Experience building and leading high-performing teams
	Prior experience in aninvestor-backed company (?500M+ revenue)preferred
	Exposure to&nbsp;PPAs, SPVs, and project finance structures


Non-Negotiables:


	Demonstrated deal-closing experience (with verifiable references)
	Direct DFI transaction experience
	Strong understanding of NERC licensing and the C&amp;I solar market
	Proven leadership in fast-paced, high-growth environments
	Comfortable operating under structured governance and Board oversight


&nbsp;

Compensation &amp; Benefits


	Base Salary:&nbsp;N3,000,000/month (fixed for Year 1)
	Performance Bonus:&nbsp;Up to N78,000,000 (milestone-based)


Benefits include:


	Comprehensive private health insurance (CEO + dependents)
	Company vehicle
	Relocation/accommodation support (if applicable)
	Professional development &amp; international travel (DFI-related)
	21 days annual leave + public holidays


Method of Applictaion&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated Resumes to:&nbsp;amy4recruitment@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Assessment Process


	Application Screening
	First Interview (60 minutes)
	Deal Case Presentation
	Technical &amp; Sector Panel Interview
	Final Interview &amp; Offer

Chief Executive Officer (CEO) – Renewable Energy Infrastructure Job at Borderlesshr




        
    

        
        Borderlesshr - Our model is predicated on empowering businesses like yours to build their engineering team without the risk, hassle or cost. You let us know what you want and we build your team from our diverse global pool of thoroughly pre-vetted software engineers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Executive Officer (CEO) – Renewable Energy Infrastructure

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Board of Directors / Portfolio Manager

Description
Our client business model is driven by three integrated revenue streams:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	High-margin C&I solar EPC and service contracts
	Government PPP solar projects under long-term Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs)
	Developer fees at Financial Close on DFI-financed anchor projects


Year 1 targets include:


	20MW contracted capacity
	Anchor PPA secured
	$10–15M DFI project financing
	?1.2–2 billion in revenue
	The long-term vision is to build a continental infrastructure platform across 17+ African markets.


The Role


	This is a foundational leadership role. The CEO will build the company from the ground up—there is no existing structure or client base.


You will:


	Define and execute the commercial strategy
	Lead all major deals and negotiations
	Manage investor and DFI relationships
	Build and lead the executive team
	Deliver a 12-month performance mandate
	This is a high-accountability, high-reward rolewith clear quarterly milestones and direct Board oversight.


Performance Expectations
Q1 (April – June 2026):


	Operational Board established
	3 signed commercial deals; 15MW+ pipeline validated
	CFO hired within 60 days
	NERC captive generation license application submitted
	?250M revenue delivered


Q2 (July – September 2026):


	Series A funding ($1–2M) closed
	Anchor PPA (10–20MW) signed
	Land secured; feasibility study completed
	?450M cumulative revenue
	At least 3 DFI engagements initiated


Q3 (October – December 2026):


	SPV incorporated; project structured for DFI bankability
	DFI term sheet secured ($5–10M)
	EPC contract signed
	12MW contracted capacity
	?600M cumulative revenue


Q4 (January – March 2027):


	Financial Close achieved ($10–15M disbursed)
	Construction commenced
	20MW+ contracted
	?2 billion Year 1 revenue
	Positive Board Year 1 verdict


Core Responsibilities
Commercial Leadership:


	Build and close a ≥40MW pipeline within Year 1
	Lead all major negotiations (C&I, DISCOs, government)
	Secure and execute anchor PPA
	Maintain minimum 25% gross margin


Investor & DFI Engagement:


	Develop relationships with DFIs (IFC, AfDB, FMO, Proparco)
	Lead Series A fundraising ($1–2M)
	Execute project finance strategy for anchor project
	Submit at least 2 international grant applications


Team Building & Governance:


	Recruit key leadership roles within 60 days (CFO, CCO, Technical Lead)
	Set KPIs and manage performance
	Drive ≥80% team retention
	Ensure governance, reporting, and compliance


Project Development:


	Oversee NERC licensing process
	Secure land and complete feasibility studies
	Structure SPVs and manage project execution
	Ensure project construction begins within Year 1


Financial Management:


	Maintain budget discipline and financial reporting
	Ensure minimum 25% margin across projects
	Oversee financial controls (including interim CFO duties if needed)


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with a minimum of 10 years’ leadership experience, with at least 5 years at Director/CEO/MD level.
	Proven track record of closing commercial deals in energy/infrastructure
	Direct experience working with or securing funding fromDevelopment Finance Institutions (DFIs)
	Strong knowledge of the Nigerian power sector(NERC, C&I solar, DISCOs)
	Experience building and leading high-performing teams
	Prior experience in aninvestor-backed company (?500M+ revenue)preferred
	Exposure to PPAs, SPVs, and project finance structures


Non-Negotiables:


	Demonstrated deal-closing experience (with verifiable references)
	Direct DFI transaction experience
	Strong understanding of NERC licensing and the C&I solar market
	Proven leadership in fast-paced, high-growth environments
	Comfortable operating under structured governance and Board oversight


 

Compensation & Benefits


	Base Salary: N3,000,000/month (fixed for Year 1)
	Performance Bonus: Up to N78,000,000 (milestone-based)


Benefits include:


	Comprehensive private health insurance (CEO + dependents)
	Company vehicle
	Relocation/accommodation support (if applicable)
	Professional development & international travel (DFI-related)
	21 days annual leave + public holidays


Method of Applictaion 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated Resumes to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Assessment Process


	Application Screening
	First Interview (60 minutes)
	Deal Case Presentation
	Technical & Sector Panel Interview
	Final Interview & Offer

Job Location:&nbsp;Gbagi, Ibadan,&nbsp;Oyo

Job Summary


	The Customer service Representative serves as the first point of contact for clients and prospects, providing accurate information, resolving inquiries, and ensuring an excellent customer experience


Responsibilities


	Attend to client calls, emails, social media messages, and walk-in inquiries courteously and professionally.
	Handle client complaints or issues promptly, ensuring satisfactory resolution.
	Accuracy and timeliness in record keeping and reporting.


Qualifications


	HND/ B.Sc. Degree in Business Administration, Mass Communication, Marketing, or related field.
	Minimum of 1 of experience in customer service
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong interpersonal, problem-solving, and organizational abilities.
	Calm, patient, and empathetic personality with a client-first mindset.


Salary
N65,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested &amp; qualified candidate should send their CV to:&nbsp;jobs@leamconsulting.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;For more enquiries, Whatsapp 09022167744.",

Customer Service Representative Job at LEAM Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        LEAM Consulting Limited is the foremost consulting firm that stands out in areas of professional certification training, HR advisory services, Business Development / Startup, and IT consulting services in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Gbagi, Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Customer service Representative serves as the first point of contact for clients and prospects, providing accurate information, resolving inquiries, and ensuring an excellent customer experience


Responsibilities


	Attend to client calls, emails, social media messages, and walk-in inquiries courteously and professionally.
	Handle client complaints or issues promptly, ensuring satisfactory resolution.
	Accuracy and timeliness in record keeping and reporting.


Qualifications


	HND/ B.Sc. Degree in Business Administration, Mass Communication, Marketing, or related field.
	Minimum of 1 of experience in customer service
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong interpersonal, problem-solving, and organizational abilities.
	Calm, patient, and empathetic personality with a client-first mindset.


Salary
N65,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested & qualified candidate should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, Whatsapp 09022167744.

Development Sales Manager Job at PalmPay




        
    

        
        PalmPay is an Africa-focused fintech firm, launched in 2019. PalmPay is a mobile payments platform that offers a number of financial services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Development Sales Manager
Job Locations: Lekki, Ikoyi, Epe - Lagos

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The DSM (Develop Sales Manager) is responsible for new city expansion and store acquisition under the shop model.
	The core responsibility is to complete the full cycle of city launch, store onboarding, and SA deployment readiness.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new cities within the assigned region 
	Conduct market research (phone markets, commercial hubs, KA stores) 
	Build relationships with local merchants and partners
	Drive store onboarding and system registration 
	Negotiate cooperation terms with store owners / KA brands 
	Ensure stores meet installment business requirements 
	Ensure stores are ready for SA deployment 
	Coordinate with SM/RM for SA assignment 
	Track first sales performance of new stores 


Requirements


	Experience in sales / channel development (POS, fintech, mobile preferred) 
	Strong knowledge of local markets 
	Excellent communication and negotiation skills 
	Willing to travel frequently.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
